Networks

Networks provide access to environmental, hydrological, and meteorological time series data.

Global Networks

  • Weather datasets
  • Hydrological records
  • Climate observations
  • Forecast services

Regional Networks

  • National monitoring systems
  • Local observation networks
  • Project-specific datasets

Capabilities

  • Real-time observations
  • Historical datasets
  • Interactive visualization
  • Parameter exploration
  • Time series integration

Usage

  1. Select a network
  2. Click map features
  3. Explore available parameters
  4. Open dashboards for analysis
